As this advertisement is being published for filling up, this advertisement shall be followed by the Regional
Officers in the office should not submit applications to this department for these positions. Submit such an application
If done, they will not be considered. Also, to notify any response to the concerned.
It won't come.
4. Under-Secretary in the Department of Ministries willing to go on deputation for the above post.
Cadre officers should not mutually submit applications to this department. They applied through their respective departments.
to be submitted. In case of mutual submission of application, the same will not be considered and will be forwarded to the concerned.
There will be no response.
5. Applications of Interested Under-Secretary Cadre Officers by all concerned Ministries / Administrative Departments.
Upon receipt, your department will be scrutinized in accordance with the provisions of the relevant Government Decision.
Proposal for deputation of officers of the cadre of Under Secretary with the approval of the Secretary.
Include the information on the attached form and shaded copies of the full confidential reports for the past five years.
Send to the function in a way that reaches the date 19.06.2026. (Do not send to the registration branch)
The names of officers of the Under Secretary cadre once elected cannot be withdrawn. As well,
Even if no officer is willing to go for deputation to this post from your department.
Please notify this section by the date 19.06.2026.
7. All concerned Ministries / Departments are hereby informed that the post in the Department is due to deputation.
Priority will be provided to the officer in the position where the vacancy occurs.
8. All the Ministries / Administrative Departments to issue the said letter to all the Under Secretaries / Cadre of their respective Departments.
be brought to the notice of the authorities.
